title: FastFlow
description: FastFlow is a Minecraft plugin that speeds up hoppers and improves server performance by allowing faster item transfers for farms, storage, and sorting systems.
body:
FastFlow is a Minecraft plugin designed to improve hopper speed and reduce lag on servers. Instead of using the slow vanilla hopper system, the plugin allows hoppers to transfer more items at a faster rate, making farms, storage systems, and sorting machines more efficient.

In this configuration, each hopper can move up to 8 items every transfer instead of the normal 1 item, while the cooldown is reduced from the vanilla 8 ticks to only 2 ticks. This makes item transportation much faster without completely breaking furnace mechanics. The plugin can also pull items from containers above hoppers and collect dropped items from the world. Additional settings such as limiting hopper processing and skipping invalid destinations help improve server performance and reduce unnecessary lag.

If there is any bugs or glichs please inform via email kaysadi11239@gmail.com
